name: kimi-k3-collab
description: Delegate engineering and visual design work from a native Codex subagent to a persistent cross-platform Kimi K3 service.

interface.shortDescription: Native Codex collaboration with persistent Kimi K3 jobs.
interface.longDescription: Adds one thin native Codex collaborator for explicit Kimi K3 engineering, review, discussion, implementation, and visual-design delegation on Windows, macOS, and Linux, including persistent jobs, status, result, cancellation, and recovery after wrapper interruption.
interface.defaultPrompt: Ask Kimi K3 for an independent engineering or visual-design review.
